statements.__comment__: GCPCloudRunRevision no longer carries :Container (revisions are versioning artifacts with no ontology label). Strip stale :Container from pre-migration revisions. Idempotent (REMOVE on a missing label is a no-op).
GCPCloudRunJob no longer carries any ontology label (individual GCPCloudRunJobContainer children carry :Container). Strip stale :Container and :Function from pre-migration jobs. Idempotent.
GCPCloudRunService no longer carries :Function. It is now treated as an orchestrator (analogous to ECSService); its child GCPCloudRunServiceContainer nodes carry :Container. Idempotent.

name: GCP Cloud Run ontology label migration
